summary: Matched and linked the Taru Cannon item translation unit by adding owned item data/state-table definitions, tightening several symbol scopes to local labels, changing ittarucann.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, and making small source-shape changes that completed two remaining functions according to the bot report.

key_files.role: Main item source matched; adds const collision/vector data, ItemStateTable contents, includes needed for types/forward declarations, fake constant-return helpers, a float temporary assignment shape, and a ternary absolute-value expression.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c extern lbColl_80008D30_arg1/Vec3 replaced by const definitions
raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c it_802962E0 ternary absolute value

key_files.role: Links the translation unit as Matching instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/ittarucann.c") changed to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/ittarucann.c")

key_files.role: Adjusts symbol metadata for ittarucann-related strings, floats, and doubles from global address-style names to local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt it_803F6460 changed to @314 local string
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt it_804D52F0/it_804D52F8 changed to @312/@313 local strings
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt it_804DCB78 through it_804DCBBC changed to local @ labels

what_changed.text: The item source now defines previously extern data for it_803B8610 and it_803B8634 as const objects in ittarucann.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c extern declarations replaced by const definitions

what_changed.text: The item state table it_803F63C0 was added with motion callbacks for UnkMotion0, 1, 2, 6, 7, 8, and 9, including HSD_GObjEvent casts on UnkMotion7_Phys entries.
configure.py now marks melee/it/items/ittarucann.c as Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor object status change

what_changed.text: symbols.txt changed several ittarucann-adjacent string/float/double symbols from global address-style names to local @ labels.
Bot report records 5 new matches: ittarucann .data, .rodata, .sdata2, it_3F14_Logic5_Spawned, and it_802962E0.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired source data ownership with symbol-scope metadata changes, allowing the unit's .data/.rodata/.sdata2 to report as newly matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c data and ItemStateTable additions
text_corpus: bot report new data/rodata/sdata2 matches

smart_moves.text: A simple branch-based absolute-value pattern in it_802962E0 was rewritten as a ternary expression and the bot report shows that function reached 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c it_802962E0 branch replaced with ternary

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a translation unit owns item data and its state table, moving declarations from externs into real typed const/table definitions can be part of closing both text and data matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c const lbColl_80008D30_arg1 and Vec3 definitions
text_corpus: bot report ittarucann .data/.rodata new matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: For local literals/constants exposed as global address-style symbols, matching may require correcting symbols.txt scope/name metadata to local @ labels rather than preserving global names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt it_804DCB78-0x804DCBBC to local @ labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: A ternary form can be the matching source shape for a manual absolute-value operation on an item variable.

naming_conventions.text: This PR retained address-style names for data symbols such as it_803B8610, it_803B8634, and it_803F63C0 where semantic names were not provided in PR evidence.
Local data symbols in symbols.txt use @number labels when scope is local, replacing global it_address names for several strings and constants.
Local item pointer naming uses ip, consistent with clear item-role shorthand in the edited functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c it_3F14_Logic5_Spawned and it_802962E0 snippets

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a temporary assignment inside an expression to influence float evaluation/register order: ip->xDD4_itemVar.tarucann.x8 = (temp_var = 1.3089969f) + temp.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c temp_var added and used in it_3F14_Logic5_Spawned
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The source contains an existing todo noting a float regswap, but no reviewer discussion explains whether this tactic is preferred style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Change a branch-based absolute-value sequence into a ternary select expression.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence supports that it matched here; it does not prove a general rule beyond trying ordinary select-like C forms.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Add small static constant-return helper functions fake1 and fake2, apparently as a matching/data-order tactic.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence does not show callsites, reviewer rationale, or why these helpers were needed; treat as weak evidence and review against matching-tactics standards before reuse.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Correct symbol metadata from global address-style names to local @ labels for strings and floating constants.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report data/rodata/sdata2 new matches
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The bot report supports improved matching, but the slice does not include map/split analysis explaining each individual symbol.

evidence_refs: raw_diff: full diff for three changed files
notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so author intent and reviewer reasoning are mostly unavailable.
Bot report provides useful match evidence for the unit and two functions, but no local build logs, objdiff command output, or reviewer validation are included beyond the automated summary.
The fake1/fake2 helper additions are visible in the diff but not explained by comments or review, so any lesson about them is weak and should not be promoted as accepted style.
The PR was merged according to metadata, but intake does not infer broader acceptance of every tactic as a global standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed owned data plus symbol metadata can close item TU data matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2216, ittarucann.c moved item collision/vector data and the ItemStateTable into typed source definitions while symbols.txt changed associated literals/constants to local labels; the bot report then showed ittarucann .data, .rodata, and .sdata2 as newly matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/ittarucann.c data definitions and ItemStateTable

accepted_candidate_records.title: Ternary select for absolute-value shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: In it_802962E0, replacing a manual if-negate absolute-value sequence with a ternary expression coincided with the function reaching 100% in the bot report.

source_update_candidates.title: ittarucann.c became a Matching item translation unit in PR 2216
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2216 changed configure.py so Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/ittarucann.c") became Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/ittarucann.c").
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor ittarucann status change
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source/path status fact rather than a decomp lesson; curator should decide whether to record it as path metadata.

source_update_candidates.title: ittarucann local data symbol labels adjusted in PR 2216
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2216 changed several GALE01 symbols around ittarucann data from global it_address names to local @number labels, including .data 0x803F6460, .sdata 0x804D52F0/0x804D52F8, and .sdata2 0x804DCB78 through 0x804DCBBC.
source_update_candidates.reason: The exact symbol-scope changes are source-owned metadata and should be curated as path/symbol facts only if useful.

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote fake1/fake2 as an accepted matching standard from this PR alone; the diff shows them but gives no rationale or review explanation.
Do not infer broad reviewer approval of all tactics; there are no review comments in the loaded PR slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: only bot issue comment present
